category_sources: Official OnDir page describes automatic script execution when moving through directories: https://swapoff.org/ondir.html
source_facts.description says it automatically executes scripts as directories are traversed.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading is OnDir: https://swapoff.org/ondir.html
docs_sources: Official OnDir homepage includes synopsis, examples, tips, tricks, and source downloads.
repo_sources: Official OnDir page provides source tarball downloads but no official source-control repository URL was found.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository was researched.
tags_sources: Official OnDir page shows shell-oriented enter/leave directory scripts and environment-variable handling.
